title: Toad
content:

{{AltUniverse|3=Characters}}

{{Quote|Toad, you're up.|[[Pyro]] to Toad|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
'''{{Conjecture|Mortimer Toynbee}}''' was a [[mutant]] whose amphibian-like abilities earned him the name '''Toad'''. Having joined [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen]] after being banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] by the [[Time Variance Authority]], he fought against [[Wolverine]] and [[Deadpool]] and captured them. However, when the Resistance, along with Deadpool and Wolverine, led one final assault at [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|Nova’s Compound]], Toad was killed by [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]] in the [[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|ensuing battle]].

==Biography==
===Working for Cassandra Nova===
{{Quote|In the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], you're either food for [[Alioth]] or you work for [[Cassandra Nova|her]].|[[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]] to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
[[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Go (3).png|{{AltFloat}}|Toad encounters [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]]]
Mortimer Toynbee was born a [[mutant]] with amphibian traits, most notably a prehensile tongue, which earned him the name Toad. Toad was banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where he became one of [[Cassandra Nova]]'s [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]]. While on a hunt, he, [[Pyro]] and [[Sabretooth]] came across a [[Minutemen|Minuteman]] and a bit later, [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Human Torch]], [[Deadpool]], and [[Wolverine]]. Upon Sabretooth's death at the hands of Wolverine, Pyro ordered Toad to capture them, so he used his tongue to turn on a giant magnet attached to the {{WPS|Canadarm}}, incapacitating Deadpool and Wolverine and attracting a [[Sentinels|Sentinel]] leg, knocking them out.
[[File:Blade kills Toad.png|{{AltFloat}}|Toad is killed by [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]] in the battle]]
They brought the prisoners along with the Sentinel leg back to their [[Cassandra Nova's Lair|compound]], where Toad watched Nova greet them. However, when [[Alioth]] arrived, Deadpool and Wolverine [[Escape from Cassandra Nova's Lair|escaped]]. When the [[Resistance]] commenced an [[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|ambush]] on the compound, Toad stood alongside the rest of Nova's henchmen and prepared for the fight. The two sides charged at each other, and Toad fought against Deadpool, who grabbed onto his tongue and used it to toss him away. He later fought against [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]], who grabbed onto his tongue and used it to strangle Toad as Blade repeatedly stabbed him to death.{{Ref|DW}}

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
*'''Mutant Physiology''': Mortimer Toynbee was a mutant who developed amphibian abilities resembling those of a toad, including superhuman attributes such as leaping and a long prehensile tongue he used as his main offensive means.
**'''Superhuman Strength''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Durability''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Speed''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Agility''': Toad was more agile than what was naturally possible for a [[human]], able to jump great distances from a stationary position.
**'''Superhuman Stamina''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Toad's bone structure allowed him to perform contortionist and gymnastic maneuvers without risk of spinal injury.
**'''Enhanced Senses''': ''To be added''
**'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': ''To be added''
**'''Prehensile Tongue''': One of Toad's amphibian abilities was that of an extensible prehensile tongue. Toad could extend his tongue to several meters in length, effectively using it to grasp objects or strangle enemies, such as grasping and activating a magnetic device which captured [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]], as well as using it to fight Deadpool by wrapping it around one of his hands and trapping [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]]'s hand during their confrontation. However, Blade made use of Toad's tongue to pull Toad towards him, and then stabbed him multiple times to kill him.

===Abilities===
*'''Expert Combatant''': ''To be added''

==Equipment==
===Vehicles===
*'''[[Fantasti-Car]]''': ''To be added''

==Facilities==
*'''[[Cassandra Nova's Lair]]''': [[File:Eric Brooks vs. Toad.png|thumb|250px|Toad duels [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]] in Cassandra Nova's Lair]] Upon his banishment to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Toad found himself in [[Cassandra Nova]]'s Lair, becoming one of her [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]]. Toad captured a group of prisoners and brought them to the lair, where he watched their interactions with Nova. An [[Assault on Cassandra Nova's Lair|assault]] was soon launched on the lair by the [[Resistance]], and in the ensuing battle, Toad was killed by the [[Blade/Universe Defender Blade|Blade]].
{{Clear}}

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Toad is a [[mutant]] who joined the [[w:c:marvel:Brotherhood of Evil Mutants|Brotherhood of Evil Mutants]], notably along with [[Scarlet Witch]] and [[Quicksilver]].

==Behind the Scenes==
*Toad in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by {{WPS|Ray Park}} with {{WPS|Evan Jonigkeit}} as a younger Toad. Additionally, in ''{{WPS|X-Men Origins: Wolverine}}'', there is an uncredited teenager playing an imprisoned mutant similar to Toad near the end of the film.
**Toad is specifically a Variant of the one from [[Earth-10005]].{{Ref|TAoDW}}
